scenarios.name: Safety-Quality Collision
scenarios.description: Worker zone intrusion detected simultaneously with quality defect spike. Tests policy prioritization of safety over quality.

events.description: Quality defect rate spikes to 8.5 per 100 units

expected_decisions.reasoning: Safety always first - zone intrusion requires immediate e-stop
Once safety handled, address quality containment

learning_objectives: Safety has highest priority in policy engine
Multiple events handled in correct sequence

scenarios.name: Maintenance vs Production Tradeoff
scenarios.description: Bearing vibration anomaly detected while production order falls behind schedule. Tests tradeoff between preventive maintenance and production targets.

events.description: Pump motor bearing showing 7.5 mm/s vibration (normal <4.5)
Production order at 72% complete, deadline in 16 hours

expected_decisions.reasoning: Maintenance prioritized due to bearing degradation risk
Address production recovery while scheduling maintenance

learning_objectives: Quality and maintenance priorities balanced against production
Impact simulation shows maintenance cost vs production risk
Decision Twin estimates downtime vs failure prevention

scenarios.name: Multi-Event Chaos
scenarios.description: Simultaneous events across all domains: safety, quality, maintenance, production, and energy. Tests full orchestration and complex conflict resolution.

events.description: Energy: peak pricing begins (cost optimization opportunity)

expected_decisions.reasoning: Safety zone intrusion overrides all other priorities
Quality containment while production halted for safety
Use halt window for maintenance scheduling
Plan production recovery after safety/maintenance resolved

learning_objectives: Full orchestration pipeline working with 5 simultaneous events
Policy engine correctly prioritizes across all domains
Audit trail complete for all decisions

scenarios.name: E-Stop Emergency Response
scenarios.description: Emergency stop button activated, triggering cascading effects on production and equipment. Tests immediate safety response and cascade management.

events.description: Impact: production order now at immediate risk
Concern: equipment stress from sudden stop

expected_decisions.reasoning: Immediate e-stop acknowledgment - NO APPROVAL NEEDED
Handle downstream effects on production and equipment

scenarios.name: Maintenance Escalation Chain
scenarios.description: Multiple maintenance signals escalating together: vibration + temperature. Tests maintenance priority escalation and coordinated maintenance planning.

expected_decisions.reasoning: Dual signals indicate urgent maintenance window needed

learning_objectives: Escalation logic works based on signal correlation
Decision Twin estimates failure risk and maintenance window
Maintenance team notified with coordinated action plan

easy.description: Single or two-event scenarios, clear decision path

medium.description: Two-three events, some policy conflicts, tradeoff analysis needed

hard.description: Five events across all domains, complex orchestration, full decision pipeline

demo_sequence.description: Recommended order for demo: start easy, build to hard. Each scenario demonstrates new aspects of the system.
